title: Isleofberk Loot tables (ice and fire)
description: This datapack adds loot tables that drop ice and fire items
body:
This datapack does what the title says

it adds loot tables for all the dragons from the mod [isle of berk](https://modrinth.com/mod/isle-of-berk)

The dragons now drop scales and dragon bones from the mod [ice and fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
